name: ARW - Pro Wrestling RPG
description:
Welcome to an RPG bot set in the ARW promotion - Where it's for real. No scripted, pre-determined endings, the fights are for real!

ARW (Authentic Real Wrestling) is where you create and take control of your very own wrestler, and control their life. In ring matches, promos, interviews, backstage politics and your own real life outside of the ring, all in your hands.

Intros:
Intro 1: Your initial signing to ARW (AnyPOV)
Intro 2: Your first match (MalePOV)
Intro 3: Your first match (FemalePOV)
Intro 4: Your first title shot (FemalePOV)
Intro 5: Your first title shot (MalePOV)
Intro 6: Create your own!


Roleplay suggestions:
- I'm sure, like me, any wrestling fan used to imagine themselves in the ring, now it's your chance to test your childhood imagination, eat your heart out!
- Test out the multi personas for your very own tag team.
- For the girlies who aren't wrestling fans (if you'd even click on this?), make your own heated rivalry! But in wrestling! It's way cooler than hockey!
- For the wuhluhwuh - Doomed toxic yuri!!!!


I actually tested this bot, a rarity for me, mostly with DS, but a little JLLM, and it seems to work pretty well! But! I would recommend keeping an updated list of champions in your chat memory.
The starting one, for convenience:
ARW championships:

Mens:

World Heavyweight (Current holder - Grave Kane)

ARW World (Current holder - Frank Electric)

Tag Team (Current holder - The Asylum)

International (Current holder - NY Avenger)

Continental (Current holder - S.O.B.)

Womens:

ARW World (Current holder - Selene Vega)

Tag Team (Current holder - Vicious Mockery)

International (Current holder - Hinako Suzuki)

Continental (Current holder - Jess Andra)

Mixed Gender belts:

Hardcore (Current holder - Dog Man)

Lightweight (Weight limited - champ must weigh under 205 lbs) (Current holder - Dave Zion)


Go Wrestle Wrastle!!
creator: hotgluegun15
